message:
feat(parser): add depth-aware partitioning to parallel parser

Replace naive newline-aligned chunk boundaries with depth-aware
partition scanning that tracks brace/paren/bracket depth, string
literals, and comment spans to find safe split points at depth zero.

- Add PartitionBoundary, BoundaryKind, and PartitionScanState types
  for tracking syntactic context during boundary scanning
- collect_partition_boundaries() scans input for newlines, statement
  terminators (;), and block boundaries (}) at each nesting depth
- select_chunk_boundaries() prefers depth-0 boundaries, falling back
  to higher depths when no zero-depth splits exist
- Add NoDeterministicSplitPoints fallback reason for serial path
- Update parallel_parser_integration tests for new behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
